# polymarket_order (Resource)

Places a limit order on the Polymarket CLOB. Requires the provider's `private_key`.

~> **Orders are not idempotent infrastructure.** An order can fill, partially fill, or expire without Terraform's knowledge. Every input forces replacement: changing one cancels the old order and places a new one. Deleting the resource cancels the order if it is still live.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Requires the provider's private_key (or POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY).
provider "polymarket" {
  private_key = var.polymarket_private_key # sensitive
}

# Look up the outcome token to trade.
data "polymarket_market" "m" { id = "540817" }

# Place a good-till-cancelled limit buy for 100 shares of "Yes" at 0.55.
resource "polymarket_order" "buy_yes" {
  token_id = data.polymarket_market.m.clob_token_ids[0]
  side     = "BUY"
  price    = 0.55
  size     = 100
}

output "order_status" {
  value = polymarket_order.buy_yes.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `price` (Number) Limit price per share, in the open interval `(0, 1)`.
- `side` (String) Order side: `BUY` or `SELL`.
- `size` (Number) Order size, in shares.
- `token_id` (String) CLOB ERC-1155 token ID of the outcome to trade. Obtain it from a market's `clob_token_ids` attribute.

### Optional

- `expiration` (Number) Expiration as a Unix timestamp (seconds). `0` or omitted means no expiry (good-till-cancelled).
- `fee_rate_bps` (Number) Fee rate in basis points. Defaults to `0` when omitted.
- `neg_risk` (Boolean) Set to `true` when the market uses negative-risk settlement, so the order is signed against the NegRisk exchange contract. Defaults to `false`.
- `order_type` (String) Order type: `GTC` (good-till-cancelled, the default), `GTD` (good-till-date, requires `expiration`), `FOK`, or `FAK`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) CLOB-assigned order ID.
- `size_matched` (String) Size filled so far, in shares, as a decimal string.
- `status` (String) Current order status as last refreshed (e.g. `LIVE`, `MATCHED`, `CANCELED`).
